name: Will adding city pages hurt me if they are mostly duplicates?

mainEntity.name: Will adding city pages hurt me if they are mostly duplicates?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if the local page is built around actual service-area needs and includes unique details. AI systems respond better to pages that are specific, structured, and useful than to repetitive location templates.
acceptedAnswer.description: Duplicate city pages can weaken performance; unique, useful local pages work much better.

description: Duplicate city pages can weaken performance; unique, useful local pages work much better.
